name: Lines
description:
**First Appearance:** Chapter 44; Episode 21

Seaman First Class Lines is one of Fullbody's subordinates from his time as a Lieutenant. Lines was unfortunate enough to be beaten up by Don Krieg's crew, and when he tried to warn his unit, he was shot by Gin and left for dead. His name was revealed in Grand Data File: Blue.

(Source: One Piece Wikia)
